title: Secure a multi-tenant inbox with scoped queries + topics
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/inbox_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.InboxLive). Security requirements: (1) on_mount :ensure_authenticated, (2) scope all queries through %MyApp.Scope{user: current_user, org_id: org_id}, (3) PubSub topic is "inbox:org:#{org_id}:user:#{user_id}", (4) handle_info({:new_message, msg}, socket) double-checks msg.org_id == socket.assigns.scope.org_id before stream_inserting (defense in depth). Multi-layer isolation.
tier_rationale: Multi-layer isolation: authn + scope + topic + defensive consumer check.
